creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
The crossgcc FAQ clearly states that gdb should not be built in the same
tree because some directories will collide adversely. Also the correct
way to avoid softlinks is to edit the one-tree.sh script.
Jerry is aware of this problems and I'm sure he'll provide a fix ASAP,
meanwhile please don't commit.
